narrative:
Warren City 5F (precinct in Trumbull County) has 732 registered voters, with 56.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 6.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 37.2%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 30.5 percentage points.
